ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Name of the channel used in the dataset */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of events or epochs in the dataset */,
  "density_per_epoch" REAL /* Density of events per epoch */,
  "mean_duration_seconds" REAL /* Mean duration of events in seconds */,
  "mean_amplitude_trough2peak_potential" REAL /* Mean amplitude from trough to peak potential in the signal */,
  "mean_frequency_by_mean_pk_trgh_cnt_per_dur" REAL /* Mean frequency calculated by the mean peak-to-trough count per duration */,
  "epoch_length_seconds" INTEGER /* Length of each epoch in seconds */,
  "merged_count" INTEGER /* Number of merged events or epochs */,
  "lengths_ROI_seconds" INTEGER /* Total length of regions of interest (ROI) in seconds */,
  "used_threshold_basis" REAL /* Threshold basis used for event detection */,
  "used_factor_for_threshold_basis_begin_end" REAL /* Factor applied for threshold basis at the beginning and end of the dataset */,
  "used_factor_for_threshold_basis_criterion" REAL /* Factor applied for threshold basis for the detection criterion */,
  "used_min_detection_pass_or_cutoff_freq" REAL /* Minimum detection pass or cutoff frequency */,
  "used_max_detection_pass_or_cutoff_freq" REAL /* Maximum detection pass or cutoff frequency */,
  "used_center_freq" REAL /* Center frequency used in the analysis */,
  "mean_SD_of_filtered_signal" REAL /* Mean standard deviation of the filtered signal */,
  "mean_troughs_per_event" REAL /* Mean number of troughs per event */,
  "mean_peaks_per_event" REAL /* Mean number of peaks per event */,
  "mean_linear_regression_freq_slope" REAL /* Mean slope of the linear regression of frequency */,
  "mean_linear_regression_freq_offset" REAL /* Mean offset of the linear regression of frequency */,
  "mean_linear_regression_freq_R_squared" REAL /* Mean R-squared value of the linear regression of frequency */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was recorded */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the dataset was recorded */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who recorded the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., EEG, ECoG) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the current version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES channels ("channel_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the channel (e.g., EEG, ECoG) */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the channel */,
  "channel_location" TEXT /* Location of the channel on the brain */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Status of the channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_experiments" (
  "dataset_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-experiment association */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_experiments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
